title: NEB OneTaq 2X Master Mix PCR
description: New England Biolabs OneTaq 2X Master Mix with Standard Buffer (M0482): 50 uL robust reaction with a 94 C denaturation and 68 C extension.

payload.notes: Vendor: New England Biolabs (NEB), OneTaq 2X Master Mix with Standard Buffer #M0482 (a GC-buffer version, M0483, also exists). OneTaq extends at 68 C (not 72 C). Annealing: 45-68 C based on primer-pair Tm (NEB Tm Calculator, OneTaq setting). The 55 C shown is a placeholder starting point. Cycles 25-35. 1X master mix provides 1.8 mM MgCl2 and 200 uM each dNTP. Source: https://www.neb.com/en-us/protocols/protocol-for-onetaq-2x-master-mix-with-standard-buffer-m0482
